evals.prompt: I have an implementation plan at docs/plans/notification-system.md with 5 independent tasks. Can you execute it using subagents?
evals.expected_output: Reads the plan, identifies independent tasks, dispatches fresh subagents per task with precise instructions. Runs two-stage review (spec + quality) after each.

evals.prompt: 서브에이전트로 플랜 실행해줘. 병렬로 돌릴 수 있는 태스크는 병렬로.
evals.expected_output: Analyzes task dependencies, dispatches independent tasks in parallel, sequential for dependent ones. Each subagent gets fresh context with only what it needs.

evals.prompt: Execute tasks 3-7 from the plan. Tasks 3-5 are independent but 6 depends on 5 and 7 depends on 6.
evals.expected_output: Dispatches tasks 3, 4, 5 in parallel. After 5 completes and passes review, dispatches 6. After 6 completes, dispatches 7. Proper dependency handling.
